positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial mandala pattern featuring stylized crescent moons, blooming lotus flowers, constellation lines, and mythological phoenix silhouettes. The design should be executed in a bold, clean, linework style with solid, flat color blocking (digital art style), reminiscent of engraving or woodcut printing. Use a palette of deep sapphire blue, muted gold, teal, and cream. The composition must be centered, filling the entire 768x768 canvas with repeating, interlocking patterns, suitable for full-coverage apparel printing. High contrast, perfect symmetry, intricate detail, vector illustration quality, elegant geometric flow. Studio lighting, graphic design print quality.
